message:
feat(daemon): add Owner tracking for tasks

Add Owner field to Task struct to track who created each task. This
enables the dashboard to display the actual task owner instead of
"(unknown)" when grouping tasks by owner.

- Add Owner field to daemon Task struct with owner column in schema
- Add migration for existing databases to add owner column
- Update all task queries (Create, Get, GetByCID, List) to handle owner
- Add Owner field to dashboard Task and DaemonTask structs
- Update dashboard server to use task.Owner for grouping

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 	Status            string
 	VMID              string
+	Owner             string

 	CreatedAt         time.Time
 	StoppedAt         *time.Time
@@ -122,6 +123,7 @@ func convertTask(dt *DaemonTask) Task {
 		RepoURL:       dt.Repo,
 		GitRef:        dt.Ref,
 		Status:        dt.Status,
+		Owner:         dt.Owner,
 		TailscaleHost: dt.TailscaleHostname,
 		CreatedAt:     dt.CreatedAt,
 		StoppedAt:     dt.StoppedAt,

+	Owner         string
